llmResponse.agenda_changes: Three items were moved to consent: Board Policy 5116.1 (10.2) moved to consent, Board Policy 1240 (10.3) moved to consent, and Addendum to Measure U Application for Adelante Selby Spanish Immersion School (10.6) moved to consent. President announced: 'I'd suggest that we move the second meeting so 10.2 to 10.5 to consent... Also at that 10.6, the addendum for the Adelante Selby Spanish Immersion Schools Measure U. We can move that to consent as well.'
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Can I have a motion to move them including 10.2, 10.3, 10.4, 10.5 and 10.6. So moved second.
